name: Mr Bullet
author: Poki
description: Mr Bullet is a shooting game where you step into the shoes of a legendary sharpshooter!️ Put on your best suit, grab your gun, and take down enemies with strategic aiming and precision shots. Use the environment to your advantage—ricochet bullets and eliminate multiple targets with the least shots possible! Upgrade your weapon, customize your look, and prove you’re the ultimate marksman. Are you ready to become the famous Mr. Bullet? How to play Mr Bullet? Click and hold to aim, release to shoot. Who created Mr Bullet? Mr Bullet is created by Lion Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Love Balls and Happy Glass ! How can I play Mr Bullet for free? You can play Mr Bullet for free on Poki. Can I play Mr Bullet on mobile devices and desktop? Mr Bullet can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
